name: agenda-ieclb-santa-rosa
description: Agenda digital da Igreja IECLB de Santa Rosa - RS

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.render:build: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.render:start: npm run seed-admin --prefix backend && npm run import --prefix backend && npm start --prefix backend
